title: UpCadhoc Merchant Coverage
description: Which online and in‑store retailers accept UpCadhoc gift cards or vouchers, and what are the applicable terms for each location?
narrative: The user seeks to purchase or use an UpCadhoc card and needs a comprehensive list of merchants that accept the card, including both physical stores and websites, as well as any constraints such as expiration dates, usage limits, non‑transferability, or category restrictions.  Documents that provide UpCadhoc acceptance details, merchant maps, and terms of use are considered relevant; information about other gift‑card brands or unrelated policies is not.

title: Authentic Savory Lamb Tajine
description: I want a traditional North African lamb tajine recipe that excludes sweet ingredients and focuses on savory spices.
narrative: The user seeks a recipe that reflects genuine North African culinary tradition. Relevant documents should describe preparations using lamb, olive oil, onions, tomatoes, saffron, ras‑el‑hanout, cumin, coriander, mint, olives, lemon confit, or other typical savory constituents, cooked in a tajine or equivalent vessel. Documents that incorporate sweet elements such as raisins, prunes, apricots, dates, or significant sugar additions—whether in the base or as toppings—are not considered relevant. Variations that add fruit or dessert-like flavors, even if the core lamb tajine remains, are excluded. The focus is on a savory, authentic spice blend and cooking method without any sweet additions.

title: Budget Electric SUV
description: I am searching for a used electric SUV priced below €18,000, with under 40,000 km mileage, located within 30 km of me, and with no recorded accidents.
narrative: The user prioritizes a low‑cost, low‑mileage electric SUV that is geographically close and has a clean accident history; relevance requires listings that satisfy all these constraints and explicitly identify the vehicle as electric.

title: Veal Paupiettes Variations
description: What are the different ways to prepare veal paupiettes, including ingredient variations and cooking techniques?
narrative: The user is cooking veal paupiettes and wants to learn about various recipes that vary in stuffing, sauce, and cooking method. Relevance requires documents that mention veal paupiettes, provide detailed recipes, ingredient lists, and instructions. Documents that only discuss vegetables or unrelated topics are not relevant.

title: Rear Window Sun Protection
description: What options and considerations exist for protecting a child’s rear seat from UV exposure with automotive solar films or sun visors, while meeting legal transparency rules, safety requirements, cost, and installation ease?
narrative: The user is a parent who wants to install a sun protection system on the rear windows of their car. They need a comparison of self‑tinted solar film kits versus adhesive or roll‑up sun visors, with an eye on the 70 % minimum visible light transmission (VL) rule that applies to front windows and any practical limits for rear windows. They also require information on benefits such as heat reduction, UV blocking, privacy, and the safety of the film (e.g., glass retention in a break). Cost, installation type (DIY vs professional), and user reviews or testimonials are all pertinent. Relevance criteria therefore include product details, legal compliance, performance figures, installation instructions, and consumer feedback; anything unrelated to automotive window treatments (e.g., household sunscreens, 3‑D model listings, or generic cleaning tips) is non‑relevant.

title: Petit Bateau Women's Stores
description: Where can I find a nearby store that sells Petit Bateau women's clothing and accessories?
narrative: The user is looking for a physical location to purchase Petit Bateau apparel specifically for women. Relevant documents should mention Petit Bateau stores, provide store addresses or a location search tool, and reference the women's collection (e.g., dresses, sweaters, T‑shirts, accessories). Documents that only discuss child or general brand information, or provide unrelated product lines (e.g., CENTRAKOR, other brands), should be considered non‑relevant. The focus is on accessibility and available women’s items, not online purchases or gift cards.

title: Discounted Renault Purchase
description: Looking for the best way to acquire a brand‑new Renault at a discount comparable to a staff car, including financing options and minimal trade‑in restrictions.
narrative: I want detailed information on the Elite‐Auto agent program for Renaults: discount percentages, available LOA or lease‑to‑own packages, trade‑in requirements, insurance costs, warranty coverage, and how these compare to buying directly from a dealership or a staff car model. Documents that discuss other brands or unrelated sales structures are irrelevant.

title: E‑Book Delivery
description: What file formats, download options, and shipping times does the School of War provide for its e‑book editions?
narrative: The user is a prospective student or library user seeking to obtain editions from the School of War and needs detailed information on supported e‑book formats (epub2, mobi, azw3), the downloading process (three separate links, Calibre compatibility), and delivery specifics (Post Office or Chronopost, postage costs, typical 4‑day transit, and print‑on‑demand delays). Relevant documents are those that describe the e‑book file types, download procedures, and delivery logistics, while any other content not addressing these aspects is considered irrelevant.

title: Reloadable Unemployment Benefits
description: What are the eligibility criteria and procedural steps for a French job seeker to reload their unemployment rights, and how does the right of option affect the calculation of allowances?
narrative: The user is a French job seeker who has partially exhausted initial ARE rights and wishes to understand how to continue receiving benefits after returning to work and subsequently becoming unemployed again. They need detailed information on qualifying periods, required work hours, impact of voluntary resignation, severance pay, difference between automatic and option‑based reload, and how amounts are recalculated. Relevant sources must cover the legal framework, specific thresholds, step‑by‑step instructions, and illustrative case studies that clarify the interaction between old and new rights.

title: Secure Online Access
description: How can I securely log in to and manage my AXA insurance accounts online, including retrieving lost passwords and verifying contract status?
narrative: The user is looking to authenticate safely into the AXA Customer Area (client space) to manage insurance contracts, access documents, and check if any contracts have been waived or are inactive. Relevance is judged by documents that describe the login process, password recovery steps, security best practices (HTTPS, official site URLs), and clauses about contract verification or waiver under the Eckert and Sapin II laws. Documents that describe alternative banking portals or unrelated services (e.g., non‑AXA Bank sites) are not relevant to this inquiry.

title: EV Purchase Incentives
description: What financial aids, tax benefits, and battery guarantee terms should I consider when buying an electric vehicle in France?
narrative: The user is a prospective electric‑vehicle buyer who wants a comprehensive overview of all financial incentives (national green bonus, conversion bonus, regional aids, tax exemptions) and battery warranty/performance expectations that affect the true cost of ownership in France. Relevant documents should provide specific figures for the green bonus, conversion premium, battery guarantee period and mileage limits, as well as how these interact with the vehicle’s MSRP and charging infrastructure costs. Documents lacking concrete subsidy amounts, battery guarantee details, or that fail to explain the practical impact on the overall purchase cost should be considered less relevant.

title: Managing Downy Mildew in Potatoes
description: How can an organic home gardener detect, prevent, and treat downy mildew in their potato crop while also determining whether infected tubers are safe to eat?
narrative: The user wants a practical, detailed guide that covers (1) early detection of downy mildew symptoms on leaves and tubers, (2) non‑chemical preventive measures such as crop rotation, proper spacing, and use of baking‑soda (bicarbonate) sprays, (3) curative strategies when infection is detected, and (4) safety assessment for consuming potatoes that show mild symptoms. Relevance is confined to sources discussing downy mildew (Phytophthora infestans), its symptoms, prevention, bicarbonate treatment, and food safety considerations. Sources that only mention other potato diseases, general gardening tips, or commercial product listings without addressing downy mildew or safety are not relevant. The goal is to provide a cohesive, actionable plan that balances disease control with food safety concerns in a small‑scale, organic setting.

title: Three Days Darkness
description: What are the predicted causes, mechanisms, and timeline of the three days of darkness as described in Monique Mathieu’s New‑Age claims, and how do these compare with related prophecies and scientific explanations?
narrative: The user seeks a nuanced understanding of Monique Mathieu’s assertion that a period of three consecutive days of darkness will occur, including the alleged astronomical or geomagnetic triggers (e.g., Nibiru, pole‑shift, cosmic cloud), the forecasted dates and duration, and the associated spiritual or apocalyptic interpretation. The user also wants to assess the plausibility of these claims by contrasting them with scientific accounts of polar shifts, solar eclipses, and atmospheric phenomena, while distinguishing relevant New‑Age material from unrelated conspiracy or unrelated media content. Relevance criteria thus include documents that directly discuss Mathieu’s prophecy, its stated causes and timelines, comparative natural‑science explanations, and credible sources debunking or supporting such events.

title: Spaceball Parody
description: What is the 1987 comedy film *La Folle History of Space* and how can I watch it legally?
narrative: The user seeks basic information about the film, including a plot summary, release details, and available streaming or purchase options. Relevant documents will contain the film’s synopsis, context, and links to legal viewing sites; irrelevant documents about unrelated topics are excluded.

title: Legends Season 6
description: What is known about the potential sixth season of Le Bureau des Légendes, including its status, release date, cast, and plot?
narrative: The user seeks up‑to‑date factual information on whether the French spy series Le Bureau des Légendes will be renewed for a sixth season, and, if so, details such as expected release date, episode count, returning or new cast members, and planned story arcs. Relevant documents provide statements from the showrunner, interviews, press releases, and fan speculation that touch on renewal status, release expectations, cast changes, and plot hints. Documents that merely mention the series without addressing season 6, or that discuss unrelated topics, are considered irrelevant.

title: French Verb ‘Prévailler’ Conjugation
description: What are the full conjugations, meanings, and grammatical usages of the French verb *prévailler* across all moods and tenses?
narrative: The user is a French language learner who has encountered the verb *prévailler* in advanced texts and wants a comprehensive reference. The topic requires the exact verb forms in the present, imperfect, passé simple, future, conditional, subjunctive, imperative, and infinitive; the participles (present, past); and a brief explanation of synonyms and common nuances (e.g., transitive vs intransitive distinctions, literary usage). Relevance is judged by inclusion of all standard moods and tenses, correct orthography, and meaning context examples.

title: Rendez‑vous Casts
description: Which celebrities appeared on Rendez‑vous en terre inconnu along with the destinations they visited, and how did the hosting evolve over the years?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive list of celebrity participants, the specific remote locations featured in each episode, and the transition from Frédéric Lopez to Raphaël de Casabianca as presenter. Relevance requires mention of the celebrity’s name, the uncharted territory visited, and the host’s role (origin and tenure).

title: Frozen Black Truffle Potato Crush
description: What are the ingredients, nutritional facts, preparation instructions, and dietary suitability of Picard's Frozen Black Truffle Potato Crush?
narrative: The user is researching this specific frozen potato product and needs a comprehensive overview of its composition (including allergens), suggested cooking methods, shelf life, price per kilogram, nutritional values, and compliance with vegetarian or other dietary restrictions. All details should be drawn from the product listing, ingredient lists, and customer reviews provided in the relevant documents.

title: Paris 12 Event Venue
description: I need an event space in the 12th arrondissement of Paris suitable for hosting a corporate conference with at least 200 seats, available for weekday evenings.
narrative: The user is looking to rent a venue for a corporate conference. Documents that provide these details (e.g., Espace Charenton’s 3000 m² venue, its event statistics, and contact information) are relevant. Documents that mention unrelated services (saunas, entertainment, other city events) or non‑venue information are not relevant.

title: Eco‑Pricing Comparison
description: How do French green electricity suppliers differ in price, renewable guarantee, contract flexibility, and added services, and which option best balances cost savings and sustainability for a typical residential user?
narrative: The user is a private individual in France looking to switch their electricity supplier. They want to compare providers based on (1) the actual cost per kWh, including any fixed or variable rate and dynamic‑pricing schemes; (2) the proportion of 100 % renewable energy guaranteed (solar, wind, hydro, biomass); (3) the contract terms—specifically whether a binding period is required, how easy it is to terminate early, and if there are hidden fees; (4) additional services such as a mobile app for real‑time consumption monitoring, the availability of on‑site solar panels, self‑consumption options, and battery storage solutions; and (5) quality of customer support (e.g., local contact, response times). Relevance requires information that explicitly mentions these criteria, ideally citing the suppliers’ own descriptions of pricing models, renewable guarantees (Guarantees of Origin), contract flexibility statements, and any product or service features that facilitate renewable adoption or consumption management.

title: Niro EV Pricing & Recalls
description: I need up‑to‑date pricing, feature details, and safety recall information for the Kia Niro EV before making a purchase.
narrative: The user is evaluating the Kia Niro EV in the French market. They want accurate MSRP information, available trim levels, battery range, and financing or leasing options. Additionally, they require a summary of any known safety recalls or defect notices that could affect value or ownership experience. Relevance is judged by documents that provide current pricing, feature specs, and reliable recall or safety data.

title: Gaul ancestry origins
description: What evidence indicates that my ancestors were Gauls and how does this heritage differ from other Celtic or Roman influences in present‑day France?
narrative: I am researching my personal ancestry and want to determine whether my lineage traces back to the ancient Gauls.  I need reliable historical and linguistic evidence that distinguishes Gaulish identity from broader Celtic groups, Roman integration, and later population movements.  The relevance criteria include primary Roman and Greek accounts, archaeological findings (e.g., Celtic settlements, burial sites), linguistic analyses of tribal names, and scholarly debates about the continuity of Gaulish culture into modern France.  Non‑historical or purely contemporary cultural references are not relevant.

title: Faro Car Rental Options
description: Which car rental agencies at Faro Airport offer free cancellation, competitive daily rates, and suitable vehicle options for a 7‑day trip?
narrative: The user is planning a 7‑day car rental in the Algarve and wants the best combination of price, flexibility, and convenience. Relevance criteria include: pick‑up and drop‑off at Faro Airport (FAO); free cancellation policy (up to 24 hours before pick‑up); daily rates below a user‑specified threshold; availability of standard features such as GPS and child seats; and sufficient insurance coverage (e.g., full coverage with no deductible). Additionally, the user prefers agencies with good customer reviews and transparent pricing (no hidden fees).

title: Nantes Train Car Rental
description: I need to rent a car from Nantes station immediately after a train arrival for a day‑trip.
narrative: The user is a train traveller arriving at Nantes Gare Sud and requires a rental vehicle that can be collected 24/7 at the station.  The rental must be available for a single day, costing less than €70, and must include basic insurance.  The user is over 21, so the age restriction applies.  The vehicle should be a compact or 5‑door economy car; a utility is acceptable if needed.  The agent should offer pickup and drop‑off at the same station and clarify any unavoidable driver surcharge.  Documents describing pickup at Nantes gare sud, 24/7 service, age limits, price ranges, and vehicle categories are relevant; documents about airport locations, city centre agencies, or long‑term rentals are not relevant.

title: Integrated Potato Disease Management
description: What are the most effective combined preventive and chemical strategies for controlling common potato diseases such as late blight, downy mildew, and silver scab in small‑scale farms?
narrative: The user seeks actionable, field‑level guidance that combines agronomic practices (crop rotation, resistant varieties, cultural controls) with specific fungicide recommendations and environmental condition considerations for the most prevalent potato diseases. title: Beaujolais Crus Comparison
description: I want to compare the ten Beaujolais crus in terms of terroir, grape variety, typical flavor profile, and price point to help me decide which one to purchase.
narrative: The user is a wine enthusiast planning a purchase and needs detailed, authoritative information that contrasts each of the ten crus (Morgon, Régnié, Moulin‑à‑Vent, Côte de Brouilly, Brouilly, Juliénas, Saint‑Amour, Chénas, Chiroubles, Fleurie) on terroir, winemaking practices, flavor notes, and market prices. title: Versatile Boat Shoes
description: Which men’s boat shoe is best for both sailing and casual city wear, considering waterproofing, comfort, and pricing?
narrative: The user is looking to choose a men’s boat shoe that satisfies dual usage: functional performance on the water and aesthetic suitability for everyday urban wear. They should also include comparative information across brands (e.g., TBS, Sebago, Srpery, etc.), price ranges, and logistical details like shipping times and return policies.  Non‑relevant documents (generic footwear, non‑men’s products, unrelated categories, or only marketing copy) should be excluded.

title: Electric Vehicle Options
description: Which Renault electric cars and financing plans best match my budget, range, and environmental incentives?
narrative: The user is researching Renault's 100‑% electric and plug‑in hybrid models (e.g., Twingo E‑Tech, Zoe, Megane E‑Tech) for purchase or lease. They need details on base price, battery capacity, estimated WLTP range, available lease terms (duration, km limit, first‑month payment), included warranties, maintenance packages, and current ecological bonus or other incentives. Relevance is judged by inclusion of up‑to‑date pricing, precise leasing options, lifecycle cost estimates, and tax incentive eligibility. The user seeks concise, actionable information rather than general vehicle specs or unrelated content such as tire dimensions or financial market reports.

title: Corfu Car Hire Comparison
description: Which car rental offers in Corfu provide the best combination of price, pick‑up location, cancellation flexibility, and mileage for a short stay?
narrative: The user is planning a trip to Corfu and needs to choose a rental car that balances cost against convenience. title: Reunion Budget Car Rental
description: Where can I find the cheapest car hire in Réunion for a 10‑day hiking trip that includes unlimited mileage, all‑risk insurance, free transfers, and free child seats?
narrative: The user is planning a trekking holiday on Réunion Island and requires an affordable rental vehicle with the following constraints: the car must be rented for at least 10 days, the rate should be the lowest possible and include unlimited mileage; all‑risk insurance should be included at no extra cost; a free transfer from the airport or hotel should be offered; and a child seat must be provided free of charge. Relevance guidelines: documents that discuss Budget or other local agencies’ pricing, insurance packages, mileage terms, free transfers, and child seat policies are relevant; documents that only mention general car‑hire information, unrelated island attractions, or private individual rental platforms without the above features are not relevant.

title: American Car Logos
description: I want to learn about the histories, designs, and symbolism behind major American automobile brand logos.
narrative: The user is looking for detailed information on the origins, evolution, and meaning of logos for key U.S. car manufacturers such as Chevrolet, Ford, Dodge, Cadillac, etc. Relevant documents must describe the logo’s design changes, company background, and notable facts that illustrate the brand’s identity. Documents that only list a brand name, offer unrelated car sale data, or discuss non‑logo aspects are not relevant for this information need.

title: Accident Compensation Guide
description: What are the steps and criteria for calculating and claiming compensation after a road accident in France?
narrative: The user seeks detailed, practical information on how road‑accident compensation is determined in France, including the role of the Badinter law, the classification of injuries (bodily, aesthetic, sexual, etc.), the calculation of compensation percentages and monetary amounts, eligibility for full or partial compensation based on fault or non‑fault, and procedural guidance for engaging lawyers and experts. Relevant relevance criteria include documents that explain compensation scales, calculation examples, legal frameworks, and practical steps for victims of various roles (pedestrian, driver, cyclist, worker).

title: Arkéa Arena Access
description: What accessibility accommodations and event information are available for people with reduced mobility at Arkéa Arena?
narrative: The user wants to find the schedule of concerts and other events at Arkéa Arena, the contact details for the dedicated phone line, and specifics about how the venue accommodates people with mobility impairments. Relevant documents are those that mention Arkéa Arena, list events, provide the dedicated line number (05 56 48 26), address and parking, and describe accommodation policies. Non‑relevant documents are those concerning other Bordeaux venues or unrelated event listings.

title: Women Farmers Indre 1969-76
description: What were the daily experiences and contributions of rural women farmers in Indre‑et‑Loire during Menie Grégoire’s broadcasts from 1969 to 1976?
narrative: The user seeks primary archival evidence of rural women farmers’ lives in Indre‑et‑Loire during the late 1960s and early 1970s, specifically letters addressed to newsreader Menie Grégoire. Documents unrelated to the archives, other time periods, non‑archival media, or unrelated topics (e.g., weather reports, sports) are not relevant.}

title: Bill Dispute Process
description: How do I contest an incorrect energy bill and involve the National Energy Ombudsman?
narrative: The user is a consumer who suspects an error in their electricity or natural gas bill. They want to know the legal time limits, the order of contacting the supplier (customer service, then registered complaint), the possibility of using the Ombudsman, the documentation needed, and how the Ombudsman can mediate. Relevance criteria include documents that explain dispute escalation, time limits, contact procedures, Ombudsman role, and guidelines for billing disputes.

title: Office Desktop Selection
description: I need recommendations for a new office desktop computer that balances performance, price, and future‑proofing for medium‑scale business use.
narrative: The user is looking to replace an aging office workstation. They want reliable compute power for multitasking, moderate graphics, and solid build quality. Relevant documents should provide product pages or guides that compare models, include detailed specifications (CPU, RAM, storage, GPU), price ranges, and information on upgradability or warranty. Exclude generic encyclopedic entries or basic configuration instructions.

title: Silver Print Evolution
description: What chronological progression and key technological milestones defined silver-based photographic printing processes?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive historical overview of silver photography printing, including dates, inventors, process names (daguerreotype, calotype, collodion, dry plates, silver gelatin, etc.), chemical reactions, and their impact on the field. Documents relevant for this need are those that detail the development timeline, technical descriptions, and historical context of silver-based printing techniques, while commercial listings and unrelated topics are irrelevant.

title: Leek Quiche Variants
description: What are the most popular variations of leek quiche and how can I adapt the recipe to use different ingredients such as dairy‑free alternatives or seafood?
narrative: The user is looking for a wide range of leek quiche recipes, including vegetarian, vegan, seafood, and different cheese or crust options, and wants step‑by‑step instructions, cooking times, and tips for freezing leftovers. Relevance requires the presence of full recipe steps, ingredient lists, alternate substitutions, and cooking instructions, and excludes generic mentions of leeks or quiche without actionable detail.

title: Road Sign Definitions
description: Find concise definitions for all types of road signs—including hazard, prohibition, obligation signs—as they appear in the highway code.
narrative: The user is preparing for a driving test and needs a quick reference guide that categorizes road signs by type, explains the meaning of each sign, and provides examples of how each sign is used at intersections, on motorways, in built‑up areas, and under various weather conditions. Relevancy therefore requires that documents specifically address highway code sign categories, their meanings, and practical usage scenarios, rather than generic traffic information or unrelated car games.

title: Mobility Assistance
description: What are the eligibility requirements, application process, and coverage details for unemployment mobility assistance in France?
narrative: The user seeks up-to-date, official information about the French unemployment mobility aid program. Relevant documents must describe: eligibility criteria for registered job seekers (e.g., NOT receiving full unemployment benefits, distance thresholds of >60 km or >2 hours round‑trip, specific contract types like CDI or CDD of at least three months), the steps to apply through Pôle emploi (personal space, adviser, timing relative to interviews), the financial coverage limits for travel, meals, accommodation, and monthly/monthly ceilings, any associated vouchers (SNCF travel or reservation vouchers), and special conditions (excluding VIE, civic service contracts, overseas departments). Documents that mention application forms, required proofs, reimbursement limits, and the role of the SAM network for host family accommodation are also considered relevant. Non‑official policy overviews, internal policy documents, or unrelated service descriptions are not relevant.

title: SFR Client Access
description: I need step‑by‑step instructions to reach my SFR client space after a recent password reset, including troubleshooting an error message I keep seeing.
narrative: The user is a current SFR customer who has recently lost or reset their SFR account password and is now encountering an error when attempting to log in to the client area. They require a clear walkthrough of the login process, how to recover or reset the password, how to identify the correct login credential (email, phone number, or NeufID), and what to do when presented with persistent error messages. Relevant documents should contain information on the SFR client area login flow, password reset links and procedures, troubleshooting tips for error codes, and contact options for customer support (SAV) or the SFR Community website. Documents that discuss the specific steps, identifiers, or error handling for the SFR client space are considered relevant, while content related to other operators (e.g., Numericable, Prixtel) or unrelated service areas (e.g., TV, sports, etc.) is not.

title: Eco-Camping Lamp
description: Which oil lamps are most suitable for eco‑friendly camping, focusing on fuel efficiency, safety, and minimal environmental impact?
narrative: The user intends to select a best‑in‑class oil lamp for outdoor camping that offers low fuel consumption, safer operation (no risk of fire or fugitive fumes), and uses sustainable fuels such as vegetable or marine oils where possible. Relevance requires information on lamp construction (glass quality, wick material, capacity), fuel types (kerosene, biodiesel, vegetable oils), safety features (ventilation, flame control), and cost relative to energy output.

title: Madeira Rental Pricing
description: Where can I find the cheapest all-inclusive car rental in Madeira for a 7‑day trip in September, with pick‑up at Funchal airport, including insurance and unlimited mileage, and no deposits?
narrative: The user seeks up‑to‑date, comparative price information for the lowest‑priced, all‑inclusive car rental in Madeira during mid‑September. The focus is on a 7‑day lease with pick‑up at Funchal airport, fully included insurance (SCDW or similar), unlimited mileage, no deductible or deposit fees, and optional gear such as GPS or child seat. title: Roasted New Potatoes
description: How can I roast new potatoes with rosemary to achieve a crispy exterior and tender interior without overcooking or over‑salting?
narrative: The user is looking for a detailed, practical cooking guide that covers selection of the right new‑potato varieties, preparation steps (washing, cutting, drying), seasoning combinations (olive oil, rosemary, salt, optional garlic or paprika), recommended oven temperature and baking time, methods for checking doneness, alternative cooking methods (aer‑fry, grill), and safety tips (handling sprouted or green potatoes). Relevance requires documents that provide step‑by‑step instructions plus safety considerations; purely encyclopedic entries describing potato biology or cultivation without cooking or safety guidance are not relevant.

title: APRE Eligibility for RSA Beneficiaries
description: Can a single mother who has just resumed a part‑time job while receiving RSA access the personalized back‑to‑work assistance (APRE), and which documents and departmental criteria apply?
narrative: The user is a single mother receiving the RSA and has recently started a part‑time contract after a period of unemployment. She wants to know whether she can obtain APRE, what the eligibility thresholds are (income, hours, RSA status), what paperwork is needed (proof of work resumption, salary slips, RSA referee approval), how local council variations may affect the decision, and the timeframe for application. Relevant documents should provide details on APRE eligibility clauses, RSA prerequisites, application procedures, and examples of required supporting evidence.
